'''Warlug''' was one of nine [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]] in [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]]. He was a member of the [[Groogrun]] clan.<ref name="EGWT" />

==Biography==
[[Ortugg]] gave Warlug the job as a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaver]] and, like the others, was a guard under the employ of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].

Instead of joining his fellow Gamorreans on their journey to the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]] with Jabba's [[Khetanna/Legends|sail barge]], which ended in the [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon]], Warlug stayed back in [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] with [[Tornik]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] guard, and got drunk. When the message of Jabba's [[Death/Legends|death]] reached the palace, [[Yarna d'al' Gargan/Legends|Yarna d'al' Gargan]] ran across the two drunks, who attempted to assault her in their befuddlement. Fortunately, [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Doallyn/Legends|Doallyn]] arrived just in time to protect her before they could commit their heinous act. He shot the Gamorrean in the back and escaped with Yarna into the [[Desert/Legends|desert]]. Warlug was lucky to survive the incident and backed off with Tornik.

{{Char-stub}}
